title: Korean Songpyeon Cazuela
description: A creative fusion dessert combining traditional Korean songpyeon with a Latin American-style cazuela, featuring a creamy mascarpone cheesecake filling.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded, blend of cheddar and mozzarella

ingredients.name: Songpyeon
ingredients.notes: glutinous rice flour, follow package instructions for preparation

instructions: Prepare the songpyeon according to package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the mascarpone, cheese, and a pinch of flaky salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, sesame oil, and ground black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the mascarpone mixture and mix until smooth.
Pour the mixture into the prepared cazuela.
Arrange the cooked songpyeon on top of the mascarpone mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the filling is set and the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
